name: sacred-timeline
description: Git for humans: capture work, protect progress, run safe experiments, and back up to cloud using plain language.

interface.shortDescription: Git for humans inside coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Sacred Timeline wraps git in plain language for non-developers and AI-native knowledge workers. Agents can capture milestones, show changes, narrate progress, run safe experiments, and back up work without exposing raw git commands.
defaultPrompt: Capture this milestone in plain English.
Tell me the story of recent work.
